instructions: Start with repoctx.get_context(detail='slices', responseBudgetTokens=2000); use outline for breadth or paths for locations. Escalate only on a gap: search for missing files/symbols, get_outline for a missing symbol in a known file, get_related_files for dependencies/impact. Reuse receipts via seen or session. Set known=path@hash only after a full-file read. stripComments is lossy. get_context already recalls matching memories; call memory_search only for a concrete prior-knowledge gap, memory_add only for durable findings. After edits call get_changes(patch=true), then run repoctx index if stale. Stop when evidence is sufficient. All processing is local, offline, deterministic.

tools.name: repoctx.get_changes
tools.description: Return added/modified/deleted files and affected importers/tests. patch=true includes delta hunks. Use after edits; re-index if stale.

tools.name: repoctx.get_context
tools.description: Primary context tool. Ranks task-relevant files under response/read budgets. detail: paths=locations, outline=symbols, slices=source spans. Reuse evidence via seen receipts or session; known=path@hash requires a full-file read. stripComments is lossy; matching memories are included by default.

top.description: Maximum new files; reused evidence consumes no slot.

known.description: Whole files held as path@hash; never use a slice/outline hash.

stripComments.description: Lossy removal of full-line comments and blank runs from slices.

tools.name: repoctx.get_outline
tools.description: Return a file's symbols, signatures, lines, docs, hash, and full-read token cost.

tools.name: repoctx.get_related_files
tools.description: Return imports, dependents, and linked tests for a file, with reasons.

tools.name: repoctx.memory_add
tools.description: Store a durable 1-2 sentence insight. Link affected files so changed hashes mark it stale; kinds: note, decision, constraint.

files.description: Linked repository files for stale detection.

tools.name: repoctx.memory_search
tools.description: Search local memories by term/tag/path with reasons and stale flags; omit query to list. get_context already includes matches.

tools.name: repoctx.search
tools.description: Find indexed files or symbols by term; returns ranked paths, lines, scores, kinds, and reasons.
